title: ADP与斯坦福联合推出Canaries Dashboard，实时追踪AI对职业重塑的影响
full_text:
Jun 10th, 2026
New Tracker Traces AI’s Real-Time Impact on Work
Nela Richardson, Chief Economist at ADP and a Bloomberg contributor, says employers need to decide whether AI is going to be a tool for automating roles away or augmenting tasks to create new value. She discusses the new Canaries Dashboard, launched by ADP and the Stanford Digital Economy Lab, to provide real-time indications of how AI is reshaping different occupations based on labor market data. Richardson joins Caroline Hyde and Ed Ludlow on “Bloomberg Tech.”
Duration: 3:10
Trump Says US Will Resume Attacking Iran 'Very Hard'
Duration: 5:13
Will Billionaires Really Flee a California Wealth Tax?
Duration: 9:28
Why The SpaceX IPO Is Unlike Any Other
Weekly Docs
Duration: 4:29
'Bloom Is Off the Rose' for Oracle, Cleo's Kunst Says
The Close
Duration: 7:19
Apollo's Kleinman Says PE Needs to Start Capitulating on Valuations
Duration: 1:39
Trump Says US Won’t Renew USMCA, Must Be Treated Better by Canada and Mexico
Duration: 20:00
Iran Was Never Going to Do a Deal, Nikki Haley Says
Balance of Power
Duration: 2:17
Will There Be Another Brexit Referendum?
